name: Euroarts: Discovering Masterpieces of Classical Music
original_name: Euroarts: Discovering Masterpieces of Classical Music
overview: Experience and enjoy in a brand new way the greatest works of classical music, from the Baroque era to the Modern period, thanks to a new series of audiovisual concert guides, Discovering Masterpieces of Classical Music. Schumann's Piano concerto, Mahler's Lied von der Erde, Ravel's Bolero or Bach's Brandenburg concertos, all the classical music's gems are performed by internationally praised artists, including Martha Argerich, Mariss Jansons, Daniel Barenboim, Claudio Abbado.
